Package org.eventb.internal.core.sc.symbolTable

Class IdentifierSymbolInfo

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.sc.symbolTable.AttributedSymbol
org.eventb.internal.core.sc.symbolTable.SymbolInfo<ISCIdentifierElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ISCIdentifierElement>,ITypedSymbolProblem>
org.eventb.internal.core.sc.symbolTable.IdentifierSymbolInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<ISymbolInfo<?,?>>, IAttributedSymbol, IIdentifierSymbolInfo, ISymbolInfo<ISCIdentifierElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ISCIdentifierElement>>
public class IdentifierSymbolInfo extends SymbolInfo<ISCIdentifierElement,IInternalElementType<? extends ISCIdentifierElement>,ITypedSymbolProblem> implements IIdentifierSymbolInfo

    • createUntypedErrorMarker

      public final void createUntypedErrorMarker(IMarkerDisplay markerDisplay) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IIdentifierSymbolInfo
      Attaches an appropriate error message to the source element if this identifier could not be typed. This message only makes sense for identifiers that have not been imported.
      Specified by:
      createUntypedErrorMarker in interface IIdentifierSymbolInfo
      Parameters:
      markerDisplay - the marker display to use
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem creating the element

    • createSCElement

      public ISCIdentifierElement createSCElement(IInternalElement parent, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Description copied from interface: IIdentifierSymbolInfo
      Create a statically checked identifier element for this symbol with the specified parent.
      Specified by:
      createSCElement in interface IIdentifierSymbolInfo
      Parameters:
      parent - the parent of the element to create
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Returns:
      the created statically checked identifier element
      Throws:
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException - if there was a problem creating the element
